content.en:
"I should be able to succeed this time, right?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He came to the third layer of the Void Tower again, and the seemingly endless and powerful beasts poured over.

The strength of these robber beasts is comparable to that of the top second-class invincibles, and they also know how to cooperate with each other, if there is a little mistake, Ye Tian will be defeated.

I saw that Ye Tian's moves were all invincible skills, and he occasionally showed his supreme skills.

After all, the supreme skill consumes himself relatively much, and it is impossible to use it all the time, otherwise if his strength is exhausted, he will also lose, so the supreme skill can only be used at a critical moment.

Bang!!!!

One by one, the robber beasts were killed and annihilated by Ye Tian, but more robber beasts rushed up.

It's an uphill battle.

The first few times he broke into the third layer of the Void Tower, he didn't persevere, but this time he at least had hope.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian has also forgotten the existence of time, he only remembers one thing, and that is to kill!

He fell into a killing frenzy, slaying more raiders at the lowest cost.

Originally, the number of seemingly endless beasts was rapidly decreasing, until one day, only a few beasts remained, and Ye Tian's appearance was extremely miserable.

At this point, his strength was almost exhausted, most of his body was gone, and he had no extra strength to repair his injuries.

Moreover, the soul power is almost exhausted.

It can be said that for ordinary people, such a state is difficult to break through.

But Ye Tian was very happy, there were only a few dozen robbers left, and these robbers were also injured.

He didn't have much strength, but he was sure to get through.

When these robbers came over, Ye Tian urged the power of the Eternal Talent Space.

The consumption of the power of the talent on oneself is very low, far inferior to an invincible skill, but the effect is good.

However, the power of talent cannot be used all the time, but Ye Tian has not used the power of talent before, but now it is a hope.

One after another, the beasts were directly hit hard by Ye Tian's spatial eternal talent, preventing them from attacking this wave.

In an instant, Ye Tian urged a variety of eternal talents, and finally killed all these robbers before his power was completely exhausted.

At this point, Ye Tian broke through the third layer of the Void Tower.

"Void God Son Ye Tian, break through the third layer of the Void Tower, and officially become the Lord of the Void!"

The machine spirit congratulated.

At the same time, a wave of power poured into Ye Tian's body, quickly repairing his injuries.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared in an Origin Void in the Void Source Hall and saw a light and shadow, and this light and shadow was the machine spirit.

"Hello master!"

The machine spirit spoke.

"Master?" Ye Tian was stunned for a moment, and then said, "If I become the Lord of the Void, can I become the Master of the Void Source Palace?"

He knew from Jin Zu's memory that by becoming the Lord of the Void, he could obtain the inheritance of the Void Source Ancestor, but he didn't know that he could also become the master of the Void Source Palace.

"Yes!" said the machine spirit, "Once you have passed the third layer of the Void Tower, you can become the master of the Void Source Palace, and you can also obtain some inheritance from the previous master, including the Void Source Tablet!"

"I want to refine and control the Void Source Hall first!"

Ye Tian asked.

This is the most important thing, and the main other things can be put on the back.

Only by controlling the Void Source Hall can this place belong to you.

"Yes, master!" The machine spirit handed over the core of the Void Source Hall to Ye Tian, allowing Ye Tian to slowly refine it.

The Void Source Hall was not an ordinary place, so it would take a long time to refine the Void Source Hall.

Ye Tian had been refining the core of the Void Source Palace, and he had been refining it for six Great Tribulation Periods, if he reached the Supreme Realm, I am afraid that he would soon succeed in refining.

After refining the Void Source Palace, Ye Tiancai can really be regarded as the master of the Void Source Palace, and at the same time, he also knows the extraordinaryness of the Void Source Palace.

The Void Source Hall turned out to be a supreme source weapon refined by the Void Source Ancestor using dozens of powerful eternal source objects and countless rare materials, and the machine spirit could control the Void Source Hall to exert a certain attack power.

Moreover, the body of the Void Source Hall is not in the Source Sea, but in a forbidden land, and the Void Source Hall in the Source Sea is actually just a special projection, otherwise it would have been taken away by those powerful supreme beings long ago.

It is precisely because the Void Source Hall is in a forbidden place, and the machine spirit can also exert a part of the power of the Void Source Palace, which has caused the Void Source Hall to be in a masterless state all the time.

Otherwise, there would be no Supreme Beings who were comparable to the Void Source Ancestor at the beginning, and they would not be able to take the Void Source Palace.

In other words, although Ye Tian had refined the Void Source Palace, there was no way to take the Void Source Palace, unless he could come out of that forbidden land, but his current strength was not good, so he couldn't do it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian came to the Void Source Ancestor's Inheritance Hall, ready to accept the Void Source Ancestor's inheritance.

At Ye Tian's level, the path has been fixed, so the inheritance of the Void Origin Ancestor can be borrowed at most, and there are also some special secret techniques, knowledge, etc., which are all very valuable things.

It only took millions of years for Ye Tian to completely fuse the inheritance of the Void Origin Ancestor.

This inheritance of the Void Origin Ancestor was still helpful to Ye Tian, such as knowing the division of the Supreme One's realm and how to take each step, and he would not take the wrong path.

Moreover, he also knew the origin of refining the Void Source Tablet now, so that he could use the origin of the Void Source Tablet to absorb other sources to impact the Supreme Realm.

"Master, now that you have mastered the Void Source Palace, do you want to expel the other Void Sons and Void Divine Sons?"

The Machine Spirit asked.

"No need!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I'm not in a hurry to use the Void Source Monument to impact the Supreme Realm now, there is no need to expose that the Void Source Hall has a master, and those Void Sons want to get more points, they must complete the tasks of the Void Source Palace, and they are also accumulating various resources for me, so why expel them?"

"Yes, master!"

The machine spirit understood.

Immediately, Ye Tian asked, "How many Eternal Source Objects and other resources does the Void Source Hall currently have?"

The machine spirit immediately replied, "The Void Source Hall currently has a total of 276 Eternal Source Objects, and 136394 Void Source Crystals ......."

The machine spirit reported the number of various resources, and after Ye Tian listened, the whole person was extremely excited.

What a fortune he could not have imagined.

He was sure that the other supreme beings were only a fraction of his current net worth.

After obtaining the Void Source Palace, his net worth was already among the top ranks of the Source Sea.
